stemHtml: A destination aerodrome on the Northern Hemisphere has a higher latitude than the departure aerodrome of your flight. To determine the shortest ground distance, you have plotted a straight line between the departure and destination aerodrome. You plan to navigate the flight exactly over the plotted line to approximate the great circle. The track to your destination has a westerly direction. Which of the following statements is correct with respect to this flight?

options.b: Due to Earth convergency, the track direction will be continuously decreasing during the flight.
options.c: Due to the increase in latitude, the final track angle at the destination will be higher than at the departure.
options.d: As great circle tracks are plotted as straight lines, they do NOT have a changing track direction.
